_comment: Vanilla redstone dust has no block/redstone_wire.json — it's a multipart blockstate over dot/line models, and the capture doesn't carry connection state anyway. Hand-authored stand-in: two full-length line planes crossed at 90° (full-cell, so adjacent wire cells read as connected). The dust textures are grayscale, tinted at runtime in vanilla; the custom `tint` face key (consumed by blockmodel.js, passed through verbatim by vendor_models) supplies the red.
